matches.evidence: forEach with async callbacks — promises silently dropped. Multiple call sites use forEach with async delete functions, meaning those promises are never awaited and failures are silently swallowed. ... forEach doesn't await async callbacks. These are fire-and-forget. Same pattern in handleCancelBooking.ts and bookings.tsx.
matches.reasoning: The review explicitly identifies the same root cause: deleteScheduledEmailReminder and deleteScheduledSMSReminder called without await inside forEach loops, resulting in unreliable cancellation of scheduled reminders.
